info.title: HaruKoto API
info.description: 일본어 학습 앱 HaruKoto의 백엔드 API

get.description: List vocabulary items with optional filters and search.
Return full detail for a single vocabulary item.

patch.description: Partial update vocabulary item. Only sent fields are updated.

post.description: Approve or reject a vocabulary item.

get.description: List grammar items with optional filters and search.
Return full detail for a single grammar item.

patch.description: Partial update grammar item. Only sent fields are updated.

post.description: Approve or reject a grammar item.

get.description: List quiz items (cloze + sentence_arrange) with optional filters and search.
Return full detail for a single cloze question.

patch.description: Partial update cloze question. Only sent fields are updated.

post.description: Approve or reject a cloze question.

get.description: Return full detail for a single sentence arrange question.

patch.description: Partial update sentence arrange question. Only sent fields are updated.

post.description: Approve or reject a sentence arrange question.

get.description:
List conversation scenario items with optional filters and search.

Note: ConversationScenario has no jlpt_level column; jlpt_level filter is ignored.
jlpt_level in response is always None.
Return full detail for a single conversation scenario.

patch.description: Partial update conversation scenario. Only sent fields are updated.

post.description: Approve or reject a conversation scenario.
Batch approve or reject multiple content items in a single transaction.

get.description: Return audit log entries for a content item, ordered by created_at DESC.

schema.title: Response Get Audit Logs Api V1 Admin Content  Content Type   Item Id  Audit Logs Get

get.description: Return review_status counts for all content types.
3-11: All achievement definitions with user's unlocked status.

post.description: 카카오 인가 코드를 id_token으로 교환 (모바일 네이티브 SDK용).
Supabase JWT에서 유저 ID/email 추출, DB에 없으면 자동 생성.
Upload avatar image to GCS and update user profile.

schema.title: Response Update Avatar Api V1 User Avatar Patch

delete.description: Delete user account: GCS avatar, DB cascade, Supabase Auth.

schema.title: Response Update Account Api V1 User Account Patch

get.description:
미완료 퀴즈 세션 조회 (배너용).

- 1문제도 안 푼 세션(좀비)은 자동 완료 처리
- 24시간 지난 세션은 자동 완료 처리
Get smart quiz preview: pool sizes, distribution, progress.

post.description: Start a smart quiz session with optimal new/review/retry mix.

get.description: 3-6: Daily study data for heatmap visualization.
3-7: JLPT level progress across all levels the user has studied.
3-8: Daily study time for chart.
3-9: Daily study volume (items studied).
3-10: 7-day breakdown per category.

schema.title: Response Get Today Missions Api V1 Missions Today Get

post.description: Ensure review_events partitions exist for the next 3 months.
Generate FSRS shadow report for a user (admin/cron only).

get.description: 카테고리별 스테이지 목록과 유저 진행 상황 조회.
레벨별 기능 가용성 매트릭스. 모든 진입/가드 화면의 단일 소스.
챕터 목록 + 각 레슨의 유저 진도를 반환한다.
SRS 복습 요약: due 카드 수 + 새 카드 수를 반환한다.
레슨 상세: 대화문 + 문제 (정답은 제거하여 클라이언트에 전달).

post.description: 퀴즈 결과 제출: 채점 → SRS 처리 → 진도 업데이트.

kanaId.title: Kanaid
kanaId.description: ID of the kana character learned

KanaProgressRecord.title: KanaProgressRecord
KanaProgressRecord.description: Request body for recording kana learning progress.
